decisions.decision: Phase 4 was an audit phase — no implementation code changed, only verification and 2 edge-case tests added
decisions.rationale: All watering/dashboard code was built in phases 3-7 which executed before phase 4 in this project's non-linear history

next_action: Start phase 5 discussion or planning: /gsd-discuss-phase 5 or /gsd-plan-phase 5
context_notes: Phase 4 verified the core product value (one-tap watering dashboard). All 13 requirements confirmed in code. Code review found 1 critical (non-null assertion in logWatering), 3 warnings, 3 info — advisory only. 6 human UAT items tracked. Next phase is 05 (Notes, Search, and Filters).
